mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals firm household demand and near-term revenue support for listed companies, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is rising.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 448086
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower-than-baseline 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward test months.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above its prior 12-month range after an extended low-rate period raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its maximum value of the prior 12 months by at least 0.10pp
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 0.24
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle after zero-rate period
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional base rate or if mean triggered returns are not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A year-over-year contraction in industrial production signals weakening real activity and pressure on cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 106.0222
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO year-over-year contractions are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of triggered cases and the downside hit rate is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A joint deterioration in payroll growth and unemployment marks a labor-market turning point that reduces income growth and increases recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly gain falls below 100 thousand while UNRATE rises at least 0.2pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 143242
fact:UNRATE latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 5.0
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion transitioning toward labor slowdown
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-unemployment trigger has no negative 20-day return edge versus either single-series trigger and the interaction coefficient is not negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with low policy rates signals credit-supported household formation and construction demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST is above its 12-month moving average while FEDFUNDS is below 1.00%
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:HOUST latest vintage available at 2015-11-01 was 1173
fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 0.24
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST-above-trend and FEDFUNDS-below-1% interaction does not outperform the unconditional 60-day return mean or if either proxy alone explains the full effect.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices raise expected policy tightening and compress equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when CPIAUCSL inflation momentum increases.
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
fact:CPIAUCSL latest vintage available at 2015-11-01 was 238.111
failure_condition: Reject if increases in 6-month CPIAUCSL inflation momentum are associated with non-negative 20-day return spreads over baseline in at least three consecutive walk-forward years.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate combined with rising policy rates signals late-cycle labor tightness and restrictive monetary response, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 5.25% while FEDFUNDS has increased over the prior 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:UNRATE latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 5.0
fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available at 2015-12-01 was 0.24
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and rising-FEDFUNDS condition is followed by positive 60-day returns at or above the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: Above-trend real GDP growth signals broad demand strength and improving aggregate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after the latest GDPC1 release is absorbed.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest annualized quarterly growth crosses above 2.0%
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 latest vintage available at 2015-07-01 was 16414.0
regime_hint: expansion with positive real growth surprises
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth above 2.0% fails to produce a positive 5-day return hit rate above 50% or if average triggered 5-day returns are below zero in walk-forward testing.
